scripts.pack:chrome: npm run build && zip -r skipper-4.0.0-chrome.zip manifest.json background.js sites.json dist/ popup/ icons/
scripts.pack:firefox: npm run build && cp manifest.firefox.json manifest.json.bak && cp manifest.firefox.json manifest.json && zip -r skipper-4.0.0-firefox.zip manifest.json background.js sites.json dist/ popup/ icons/ && mv manifest.json.bak manifest.json
